title: Senior devs quit big tech for this
meta_description: Senior engineers leave big tech even when pay is high — hidden friction in review cycles, on-call rotations, and deployment pipelines burns them out. Here are the real reasons with actionable fixes.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers don’t quit big tech for more money.

They quit because a one-line change takes 3 days to merge and wakes them up at 2 a.m.

https://kubaik.github.io/senior-devs-quit-big-tech-for-this
